post.title: The Food For Good Summit
post.message:
Across Kingston-Galloway-Orton Park (KGO), residents, community leaders and partner organizations collaborated to address growing food-related challenges in KGO.

To share key learnings and build on this work, the East Scarborough Storefront is hosting the Food for Good Summit!

location.location: University of Toronto Scarborough Harmony Commons Event Space: Room 116/118  3300 Ellesmere Rd. Scarborough, ON M1C 1G9
